\DoxyCodeLine{28712\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ Some\ features\ might\ use\ an\ interface\ IID\ as\ the\ GUID.\ \ For\ these,\ once\ the\ feature\ is\ enabled\ via}}
\DoxyCodeLine{28713\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ D3D12EnableExperimentalFeatures,\ D3D12GetDebugInterface\ can\ then\ be\ called\ with\ the\ IID\ to\ retrieve\ the\ interface}}

\DoxyCodeLine{28722\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ The\ call\ returns\ E\_NOINTERFACE\ if\ an\ unrecognized\ feature\ is\ passed\ in\ or\ Windows\ Developer\ mode\ is\ not\ on.}}
